/CAL: SENTENCING/TWS/CH2:CJ 5D/CTS: 5/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD: COLLECTION OF FINE AND FEES SUSPENDED/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURTNO, 19003259/4019HALF/DISM3/

/CAL: DEFENSE'S ADD TO CALENDAR TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT AND GLOBAL DISPOSITION/BWR: 11-28-19/BWR1/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEAOF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/X:THE DEFENSE STATES THE DEFENDANT HAS ABED WAITING FOR THE DEFENDANT AT THE SALVATION ARMY/OR/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO PARTICIPATE IN SALVATION ARMY AS A CONDITION  OF OWN RECOGNIZANCE/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X:THE DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED WITH PROOF OF PROGRAM/
